articles.title: BBVA and OpenAI collaborate to transform global banking
articles.summary: BBVA has partnered with OpenAI to revolutionize global banking by integrating AI technology into its operations, aiming to enhance customer experience and improve efficiency. This collaboration is expected to bring about significant innovations in areas such as customer service, risk management, and financial analysis. By leveraging OpenAI's cutting-edge technology, BBVA seeks to stay ahead of the curve in the rapidly evolving banking landscape.

articles.title: BNY builds “AI for everyone, everywhere” with OpenAI
articles.summary: BNY Mellon has partnered with OpenAI to democratize access to artificial intelligence, making it available to everyone, everywhere. This collaboration aims to harness the power of AI to drive innovation and improve customer experiences across the financial services industry. By doing so, BNY Mellon is poised to revolutionize the way it operates and delivers services to its clients.

articles.title: How We Used Codex to Ship Sora for Android in 28 Days
articles.summary: The team behind Sora leveraged Codex, a cutting-edge AI-powered coding tool, to rapidly develop and ship the Android version of their app in just 28 days. This remarkable feat demonstrates Codex's potential to significantly accelerate development timelines and improve coding efficiency. By harnessing Codex's capabilities, the Sora team was able to achieve a lightning-fast release, showcasing the tool's potential to revolutionize app development.

articles.title: Advancing science and math with GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a powerful AI model that promises to revolutionize science and math education by providing personalized learning experiences and assisting with complex problem-solving. This cutting-edge technology has the potential to make STEM subjects more accessible and engaging for students of all levels. With GPT-5.2, students can expect more efficient learning outcomes and improved understanding of complex concepts.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-5.2
articles.summary: Researchers have unveiled GPT-5.2, a significant update to the GPT series, boasting enhanced language understanding and generation capabilities. This new model promises to revolutionize natural language processing tasks, enabling more accurate and human-like text generation. With GPT-5.2, developers can create more sophisticated chatbots, virtual assistants, and content generation tools.

articles.title: Improved Gemini audio models for powerful voice experiences
articles.summary: Google has enhanced its Gemini audio models, enabling more accurate and efficient voice recognition capabilities. This improvement is expected to significantly enhance voice experiences across various applications, including virtual assistants and voice-controlled devices. With Gemini, users can expect faster and more reliable voice interactions, revolutionizing the way they interact with technology.

articles.title: Deepening our partnership with the UK AI Security Institute
articles.summary: A leading tech company is strengthening its partnership with the UK AI Security Institute to advance AI security research and development. This collaboration aims to enhance the security and trustworthiness of AI systems, driving innovation in the field. By working together, they seek to address emerging AI security challenges and promote responsible AI practices.

articles.title: Strengthening our partnership with the UK government to support prosperity and security in the AI era
articles.summary: A major tech company has announced a strengthened partnership with the UK government to drive innovation and prosperity in the AI era. This collaboration aims to harness AI for economic growth, cybersecurity, and national security, while also addressing ethical concerns. By working together, the UK government and the tech company seek to establish the country as a leader in responsible AI development and deployment.

articles.title: FACTS Benchmark Suite: Systematically evaluating the factuality of large language models
articles.summary: Researchers have introduced the FACTS Benchmark Suite, a comprehensive tool for evaluating the factuality of large language models, enabling a systematic assessment of their ability to provide accurate and reliable information. This benchmark suite aims to identify and mitigate the spread of misinformation by testing language models' performance on a wide range of factual tasks. By using FACTS, developers can refine their models to produce more trustworthy and informative outputs.

articles.title: Engineering more resilient crops for a warming climate
articles.summary: Scientists are developing more resilient crops to thrive in a warming climate, using advanced engineering techniques to enhance their ability to withstand rising temperatures and extreme weather conditions. This innovation aims to improve crop yields and food security, helping to mitigate the impacts of climate change on global agriculture. By creating climate-resilient crops, researchers hope to ensure a more sustainable food supply for future generations.

articles.title: New in llama.cpp: Model Management
articles.summary: The latest update to llama.cpp introduces model management, allowing users to easily manage and switch between different AI models. This innovation enables more flexibility and customization, making it simpler for developers to experiment with various models and applications. By streamlining model management, llama.cpp enhances its usability and versatility for AI development.

articles.title: Codex is Open Sourcing AI models
articles.summary: Codex is making its AI models open-source, allowing developers to access and build upon the technology. This move is expected to accelerate innovation in the field of artificial intelligence and enable the creation of more sophisticated AI-powered tools. By open-sourcing its models, Codex is democratizing access to AI and paving the way for new applications and use cases.

articles.title: Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker: Cost-efficient Frontier Multimodal Performance
articles.summary: The Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker model has achieved a breakthrough in multimodal performance, offering a cost-efficient solution for various AI applications. This innovation enables more efficient processing of multiple data types, such as text, images, and audio, making it a significant advancement in the field of artificial intelligence. By reducing computational costs, the Apriel-1.6-15b-Thinker model has the potential to expand AI accessibility and adoption across industries.

articles.title: Introducing swift-huggingface: The Complete Swift Client for Hugging Face
articles.summary: The Hugging Face team has introduced swift-huggingface, a comprehensive Swift client that enables seamless integration with their popular AI model hub. This new client allows developers to easily access and utilize Hugging Face's vast library of models in their Swift-based projects, streamlining AI-powered app development. By bridging the gap between Swift and Hugging Face, developers can now leverage cutting-edge AI models to enhance their iOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS applications.

articles.title: DeepMath: A lightweight math reasoning Agent with smolagents
articles.summary: DeepMath is a cutting-edge, lightweight math reasoning agent that leverages smolagents to solve complex mathematical problems with increased efficiency. This innovative technology has the potential to revolutionize the field of mathematics by providing a more accessible and user-friendly platform for problem-solving. By utilizing smolagents, DeepMath can tackle a wide range of mathematical challenges with improved accuracy and speed.

articles.title: Recovering Anthony Bourdain's (really) lost Li.st's
articles.summary: Developers have successfully recovered a collection of Anthony Bourdain's lists from a defunct note-taking app called Li.st, preserving the late chef's thoughts and recommendations for fans. The recovered lists offer a unique glimpse into Bourdain's interests and preferences, ranging from favorite books to travel destinations. This digital archaeology project has breathed new life into Bourdain's online legacy, making his insightful and often humorous lists available to the public once again.

articles.title: I fed 24 years of my blog posts to a Markov model
articles.summary: A blogger fed 24 years of their posts to a Markov model, generating surprising and often humorous results, including coherent-sounding but nonsensical text. The experiment showcases the model's ability to learn and mimic the blogger's writing style, highlighting the potential of AI in content generation. The project demonstrates the impressive capabilities of Markov models in understanding and replicating human language patterns.

articles.title: VPN location claims don't match real traffic exits
articles.summary: Researchers have found that many VPNs misrepresent their location claims, with actual traffic exiting from different countries than advertised. This discrepancy raises concerns about user privacy and security, as it may indicate a lack of transparency or even intentional deception by VPN providers. The findings highlight the need for users to verify VPN claims and choose providers that prioritize transparency and accuracy.

articles.title: Rocket Lab – 'Raise and Shine' Launch for JAXA [video]
articles.summary: Rocket Lab has successfully launched a mission for the Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency (JAXA), dubbed "Raise and Shine", marking a significant milestone in their partnership. The launch demonstrates Rocket Lab's capabilities in supporting international space agencies and advancing space exploration. This mission highlights the growing collaboration between private space companies and government agencies in the pursuit of space innovation.

articles.title: Flat-pack washing machine spins a fairer future
articles.summary: A new flat-pack washing machine design aims to make laundry more accessible and sustainable by reducing shipping costs and environmental impact. This innovative approach allows the machine to be easily assembled and disassembled, promoting repair and reuse. By simplifying logistics and increasing recyclability, this design could bring affordable and eco-friendly laundry solutions to more people worldwide.
